Lash Services

Eyes That Captivate

Your eyes deserve to be the center of attention. From natural, wispy classic sets to full-glam volume fans, Mia's lash artistry is designed to enhance your natural eye shape with premium, lightweight extensions that feel as good as they look. Whether you want an everyday "I woke up like this" effect or red-carpet drama, every set is meticulously customized — strand by strand — to frame your eyes with effortless beauty that lasts for weeks.

Our Work

Lash Artistry Gallery

Swipe through real client transformations — from subtle and natural to bold and dramatic.

✦Classic Full Set
✦Hybrid Set
✦Volume Full Set
✦Lash Lift
✦Mega Volume

Service Menu

Lash Services

Every set is customized to your eye shape, lifestyle, and desired look. Premium materials only.

✦ Full Sets

Classic Full Set

One extension per natural lash — beautiful length with a perfectly curled mascara look.

1h 45min$125Book

Hybrid Full Set

Custom blend of Classic and Volume for more texture and fluff without being overly heavy.

1h 45min$155Book

Volume Full Set

Maximum glamour — lightweight fans for a bold, high-density, fluffy appearance.

1h 45min$185Book
✦ Fills & Maintenance

Classic Fill

Routine maintenance to keep your Classic set looking full and fresh.

1h$75Book

Hybrid Fill

Upkeep for your Hybrid set to maintain its textured, multi-dimensional look.

1h 45min$85Book

Volume Fill

High-density refresh to keep your Volume fans bold and dramatic.

1h 45min$100Book
✦ Treatments

Lash Lift

Semi-permanent lift and curl from the base — longer, more vibrant natural lashes.

1h 15min$85Book

Eyelash Removal

Safe, professional removal using gentle dissolving gel to protect natural lash health.

30min$30Book

Booking Policies

Cancellation: We require at least 24 hours' notice for cancellations or rescheduling.
Late Arrivals: Arrivals 15+ minutes late may result in a shortened service or rescheduling.
Lash Fills: Must have at least 40% of extensions remaining. Less than 40% will be charged as a Full Set.
Preparation: Please arrive with a clean, makeup-free face for maximum retention.

Brow Artistry & PMU

Your Perfect Brow

From microblading to ombre shading, lamination to tinting — every technique mastered to create brows that perfectly frame your face.

Service Menu

Brow Artistry & PMU

Semi-permanent and enhancement services designed by hand with precision artistry.

❋ Permanent Makeup

Combo Brows (Nano & Shading)

The ultimate brow — microbladed hair strokes at the front with machine shading for defined, natural results.

3h$350Book

Nano Brows

Advanced machine technique using ultra-fine needles for delicate, hair-like strokes. All skin types.

3h$300Book

Microblading

Semi-permanent manual hair-like strokes for highly realistic, fuller-looking brows.

2h$250Book

Ombre Brow Shading

Machine-shaded soft powdered look — lighter at the front, darker at the tail.

3h$250Book

PMU Tattoo Removal

Safe lightening or removal of unwanted permanent makeup or old brow tattoos.

30min$150Book

Skin & Body

Advanced technology meets luxury — every treatment customized for transformative results.

◈ Skin Treatments

Microneedling

Collagen-stimulating treatment improving fine lines, scars, and overall skin texture.

45min$165Book

MicroDermabrasion & Chemical Peel

Powerful exfoliating duo — removes dead cells, reveals glowing, even-toned skin.

30min$125Book

Microdermabrasion

Deep exfoliation to refresh skin and improve clarity.

1h$85Book

Non-invasive radiofrequency to stimulate collagen and firm loose skin.

Wood Therapy

Body contouring using wooden tools to break down fat deposits and improve lymphatic drainage.

30min$85Book

Cavitation

Advanced technology targeting stubborn fat cells for a more toned silhouette.

30min$85Book

Booking Policies

Cancellation: 24 hours' notice required for cancellations or rescheduling.
Late Arrivals: 15+ minutes late may result in shortened service or rescheduling.
Preparation: Arrive with clean skin. Avoid retinol and acids 48 hours before treatments.

About Mia

The Artist Behind
Your Beauty

With a passion for artistry and dedication to making every client feel beautiful, Mia has become one of Miami's most sought-after beauty professionals.

✦Mia's Portrait
Est. 2021 · Miami

My Story

Beauty has always been my calling. After years of training with master artists across the country, I founded I Am Beautiful to create a space where every woman can discover and celebrate her natural beauty.

My approach is deeply personal — the best results come from truly understanding each client's unique features, lifestyle, and goals. Every stroke, every treatment is an act of artistry and care.

With over 2,000 transformations and counting, I'm honored to be trusted by clients from all over South Florida and beyond.

Licensed EstheticianCertified PMU ArtistLash Extension SpecialistLaser TechnicianAdvanced Skincare

Philosophy

What Sets Us Apart

✦

Artistry First

Every treatment approached as art. We design with your natural features, never against them.

♡

Client Centered

Your comfort, vision, and confidence — that's what drives every decision we make.

✧

Luxury Experience

From arrival to reveal, every detail curated for an elevated, unforgettable experience.
